name: p00f-raycast
title: P00f
description: Create zero-knowledge, ephemeral p00f links from Raycast.
author: miguel_caetano_dias

commands.name: create-poof
commands.title: Create Poof
commands.description: Create a p00f link from text.

commands.name: poof-selection
commands.title: Poof Selection
commands.description: Create a p00f link from the selected text.

commands.name: poof-clipboard
commands.title: Poof Clipboard
commands.description: Create a p00f link from clipboard text or one copied file.

preferences.name: base
preferences.title: p00f Base URL
preferences.description: Hosted p00f service or a self-hosted base URL.

preferences.name: defaultReveals
preferences.title: Default Reveal Budget
preferences.description: Default number of Reveals before a Poof burns.

preferences.name: defaultRevealAnchored
preferences.title: Reveal-Anchored TTL
preferences.description: Start the timer on first Reveal by default.
preferences.label: Start the timer on first Reveal

preferences.name: defaultAllowViewerDelete
preferences.title: Viewer Delete
preferences.description: Let the viewer delete the Poof by default.
preferences.label: Let the viewer delete it

preferences.name: defaultRequireTurnstile
preferences.title: Reveal Captcha
preferences.description: Require recipients to solve a browser captcha before Reveal by default.
preferences.label: Require captcha on Reveal

preferences.name: openInBrowserAfterCreate
preferences.title: Open After Create
preferences.description: Open newly created Poof links in the browser.
preferences.label: Open link in browser after create

preferences.name: pasteAfterCreate
preferences.title: Paste After Create
preferences.description: Paste the created Link into the frontmost app after copying it.
preferences.label: Paste Link into frontmost app

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ../core && ray build -e dist
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint
